hooks.command: cd /Users/jasper/ClaudeCode/music-agent/aidj && npm run build && npx tsc --noEmit

hooks.prompt:
When working in the AIDJ project (/Users/jasper/ClaudeCode/music-agent/aidj), always use the multi-agent workflow:

1. For any feature/bug task, invoke TeamLeader to orchestrate:
   - TeamLeader creates task, assigns to Dev Agent
   - Dev Agent implements
   - Test Agent verifies
   - Code Review Agent reviews
   - Loop until all quality gates pass

2. Agent team prompt files are located at:
   - /Users/jasper/ClaudeCode/music-agent/aidj/TEAM_LEADER_PROMPT.md
   - /Users/jasper/ClaudeCode/music-agent/aidj/DEVELOPMENT_AGENT_PROMPT.md
   - /Users/jasper/ClaudeCode/music-agent/aidj/TESTING_AGENT_PROMPT.md
   - /Users/jasper/ClaudeCode/music-agent/aidj/CODE_REVIEW_AGENT_PROMPT.md

3. Current project state: Commercial-ready. All P0-P2 tasks completed:
   - Error handling, input validation, retry logic, type safety
   - Rate limiting, caching, loading states, user feedback
   - Favorites, play history, preferences, Sentry

4. Default workflow for any task:
   TeamLeader → Dev Agent → Test Agent → Code Review Agent → (loop if needed) → Done

Do not skip the agent cycle. Always delegate to the appropriate agent.
